Formula for calculating Enmity: 
HP Ratio = 1 - (Current HP / Max HP)
Enmity Strength = Modifier * ((1 + 2 * HP Ratio) * HP Ratio)

Example 1:
7% * ((1 + 2 * 50%) * 50%) = 7%

Example 2:
7% * ((1 + 2 * 100%) * 100%) = 21%

[25 ≤ HP Percentage ≤ 100]
HP Percentage = (Current HP / Max HP) * 100

[1 ≤ Skill Level ≤ 15 (10 for Small)]
Stamina Strength = (HP Percentage / (Coefficient - Skill Level))^2.9 + 2.1

[11 ≤ Skill Level ≤ 15 for Small]
Stamina Strength = (HP Percentage / (Coefficient - (10 + (2 * (Skill Level-10)))))^2.9 + 2.1

[15 < Skill Level ≤ 20]
Stamina Strength = (HP Percentage / (Coefficient - (15 + (0.4 * (Skill Level-15)))))^2.9 + 2.1

[20 < Skill Level ≤ 25]
Stamina Strength = (HP Percentage / trunc(Coefficient - (17 + 0.34*(Skill Level-20)),1))^2.9 + 2.1) 

[Skill Level = 25]
Stamina Strength = (HP Percentage / (Coefficient - 18.7))^2.9 + 2.1
